text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as we begin jogging around the perimeter of
the summer campgrounds...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Trainer, shouldn't we be takin' a break
right about now?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh, I've been lookin' forward to some fun in
the summer sun forever though!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: The ocean's right there! How can I stop myself from takin' a dip?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I can't take it anymore! I just gotta go swimming!
choice_data_list: Why don't we do some ocean training, then?
Let's finish our training as quick as we can first!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Ocean training?! Count me in!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Should I try swimmin' into the waves? Or
challenge some dolphins to a race?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'm down for anything! Lemme get changed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle puts her desire to play in the ocean
to good use while she trains.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see! The quicker we finish up, the quicker
we can go for a dip!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: All righty! Time to buckle down for some training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Determined to get to the fun as soon as possible,
Taiki Shuttle finishes her training in the blink of
an eye.
